input.old_string:
config = {
    # Core System Packages
    # These are installed system-wide and available to all users (including root).
    environment.systemPackages = with pkgs; [
      # Editors
      vim
      emacs

      # Network Tools
      wget
      curl

      # System Monitor
      htop

      # Version Control
      git
    ];
input.new_string:
config = {
    # MemTest86+ boot entry for memory diagnostics
    boot.loader.systemd-boot.memtest86.enable = true;

    # Core System Packages
    # These are installed system-wide and available to all users (including root).
    environment.systemPackages = with pkgs; [
      # Editors
      vim
      emacs

      # Network Tools
      wget
      curl

      # System Monitor
      htop

      # Hardware Diagnostics
      smartmontools
      nvme-cli
      lm_sensors
      memtester

      # Version Control
      git
    ];

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(common): add MemTest86+ boot entry and hardware diagnostic packages

Enable MemTest86+ in the systemd-boot menu for memory diagnostics and
add smartmontools, nvme-cli, lm_sensors, and memtester to all hosts.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "feat(common): add MemTest86+ boot entry and hardware diagnostic packages" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Enable MemTest86+ in the systemd-boot menu (`boot.loader.systemd-boot.memtest86.enable = true`) for memory diagnostics on all hosts
- Add hardware diagnostic packages to `environment.systemPackages`: smartmontools, nvme-cli, lm_sensors, memtester

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify NixOS evaluation succeeds for all hosts
- [ ] Confirm MemTest86+ appears in the systemd-boot menu after deployment
- [ ] Confirm `smartctl`, `nvme`, `sensors`, and `memtester` commands are available

Run: 20260302-1855-70c6
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/299

Here's what was done in `modules/common/system.nix`:

1. **MemTest86+ boot entry** — Added `boot.loader.systemd-boot.memtest86.enable = true;` at the top of the `config` block, so all hosts using systemd-boot will have a MemTest86+ entry in their boot menu.

2. **Hardware diagnostic packages** — Added `smartmontools`, `nvme-cli`, `lm_sensors`, and `memtester` under a new "Hardware Diagnostics" section in `environment.systemPackages`.

result:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/299

Here's what was done in `modules/common/system.nix`:

1. **MemTest86+ boot entry** — Added `boot.loader.systemd-boot.memtest86.enable = true;` at the top of the `config` block, so all hosts using systemd-boot will have a MemTest86+ entry in their boot menu.

2. **Hardware diagnostic packages** — Added `smartmontools`, `nvme-cli`, `lm_sensors`, and `memtester` under a new "Hardware Diagnostics" section in `environment.systemPackages`.
